$comment: Copy to router.config.json (or set ROUTER_CONFIG). Point each harness provider at http://localhost:4141/p/<name>. Pricing is automatic: known gateway hosts (GitHub Copilot) are priced from the live feed, unknown gateways assume catalog API pricing, and `pricing` covers models the catalog doesn't know.

providers.name: copilot
providers.$comment: No models/pricing needed: the host is recognized, so served models and subscription (zero marginal cost) pricing come from the feed automatically.

providers.name: mygateway
providers.$comment: Known models (claude-*, gpt-*) assume catalog API pricing automatically. `pricing` registers + prices the private model. `adapter` (optional) reshapes request/response JSON if this gateway deviates from the standard dialects.
